has_meaning: "The creature acts as the instrument of another's will, carrying out a god's or character's purpose."
"The creature opposes the protagonist as an active adversary to be confronted or overcome."
"The creature, or its image, serves to ward off evil and protect against harm."
"The creature functions as a moral or didactic example, illustrating a lesson or spiritual truth."
"The creature protects a place, treasure, or person, guarding a threshold or boundary against intruders."
"The creature leads, accompanies, or directs the protagonist, offering aid or direction on their path."
"The creature blocks the protagonist's progress as a barrier to be passed, without necessarily acting as a personal enemy."
"The creature enacts punishment or retribution, serving as the instrument of justice or contrapasso."
"The creature shields and safeguards a person or place from harm, actively defending its charge against threats"
"The creature functions as a venerated emblem or sign of the sacred, divine, or transcendent."
"The creature embodies or undergoes metamorphosis, the change of form that is itself the narrative event."
"The creature is deployed as an instrument of war or destruction, a tool of power wielded against others."
"The creature's own action precipitates a conflict or catastrophe, setting events in motion through its own transgression."
